channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI will lead to mass unemployment, a new paper says — but other researchers are skeptical
item.description: The Citrini Research paper imagines a scenario in which widespread AI adoption leads to disruption and societal chaos. Evercore called it “thought-pro...

item.title: Consumers are more upbeat about the U.S. economy than previously thought
item.description: Consumer spending has been the most important driver of economic growth over the past year.

item.title: ‘I found out too late’: My stepmother cheated me out of $500K from my father’s estate. What can I do?
item.description: “Within a week or two after the deadline to contest the will expired, my stepmother sent me an email stating she would not share anything.”

item.title: My grandpa retired happily at 70 with $750K after working as a missionary. I know where most Americans go wrong.
item.description: “You could even retire at 55 with $500,000 and be perfectly fine. Am I right?”

item.title: AMD’s stock rockets as Meta deal serves as major validation point for investors
item.description: Meta, looking to diversify beyond Nvidia, bets big on AMD chips, with a chance to invest in the company.

item.title: Loop Capital upgrades this semiconductor stock as key headwinds ease and its strategy diversifies
item.description: Loop Capital sees shares of Qualcomm surging 32% from here.

item.title: AI sell-off in this travel stock looks overdone, says Morgan Stanley
item.description: The bank upgraded the travel technology company to overweight from equal weight.

item.title: Raymond James double upgrades this auto parts distributor ahead of planned business separation
item.description: Raymond James sees shares of Genuine Parts Company rallying 25% from here.

item.title: The big market rotation may lead to gains in this health care name. Trading it with options
item.description: Nishant Pant breaks down this bull call spread.

item.title: Deutsche Bank downgrades private credit poster child Blue Owl after recent sell-off
item.description: Shares of Blue Owl have sunk 30% this year and appear fairly valued, Deutsche Bank wrote.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
